title: sesamum capense
intro: Sesamum capense, also known as White Pusley, is a flowering plant in the sesame family, native to tropical Africa and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The plant has several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Sesamum capense can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in topical applications such as creams and ointments.
